settings.description: Precision-engineered architectural hardware systems for glass, doors, and facades. Designed for professionals who demand excellence.

settings.heading: System Categories
settings.big_text: Premium glass balustrade and pool fencing systems for residential and commercial projects.
settings.card1_text: High-performance sliding door track and hardware system for seamless indoor-outdoor living.
settings.card2_text: Precision-engineered shower screen hardware and enclosure systems for modern bathrooms.
settings.card3_text: Structural glass canopy and facade fixing systems for striking architectural statements.
settings.card4_text: Heavy-duty commercial door and glass partition systems for offices, retail and hospitality.
